case_title: BANK OF AMERICA VS. JACINTO L LUNA et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2002 CONTINUED TO NOV-20-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). OCT-16-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT NON JURY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-20-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, JACINTO L AKA JACINTO N LUNA JR. REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $124.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, JACINTO L AKA JACINTO N LUNA JR.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-06-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNA, JACINTO L AKA JACINTO N LUNA JR. $1,642.92 PRINCIPAL, $411.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $108.92 INTEREST, $124.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,287.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA SERVED JUN-10-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, JACINTO L AKA JACINTO N LUNA JR.
